MASTER_OF_MANKIND-EMPEROR.title: The Emperor
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-EMPEROR.description: The Master of Mankind. He reads the shape of battles to come and turns present sacrifice into future command.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-EMPEROR.goldMonologue: [sine]+Gold is merely another instrument of unity.+[/sine]
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-EMPEROR.aromaPrinciple: [sine][gold]+A sovereign light cuts through the dark.+[/gold][/sine]
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-EMPEROR.cardsModifierD: Emperor cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
